title: geranium berteroanum var. ciliatum
intro: Geranium berteroanum var. ciliatum, also known as 'Ciliatum Geranium', is a flowering plant species of the geranium family, native to the Pacific Islands. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Hawaiian medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The leaves and roots of the Geranium berteroanum var. ciliatum plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
